keyPoints.text: 4Έ╢ΕΆ╕░ Ήκ░ΉιΧ ΊζυΉΕζ EPS 2.08ΈΜυΈθυΈκε ΉιΕΈΖΕ ΈΝΑΈ╣Ε 15% ΉοζΆ░Α, Έ│┤Ά│ι Ά╕░ΉνΑ EPSΈΠΕ 1.98ΈΜυΈθυΈκε 19% ΉΕ▒ΉηξΊΧαΈσ░ ΈΣΡ ΉηΡΈο┐ΉΙα EPS ΉΕ▒ΉηξΉΕ╕ ΉπΑΉΗΞ
2026ΈΖΕ Ήκ░ΉιΧ ΊζυΉΕζ EPS Ά░ΑΉζ┤ΈΞαΉΛν 8.43~8.63ΈΜυΈθυ(+12~15%)Έξ╝ ΉιεΉΜεΊΧ┤ Ά░ΧΊΧε ΉΕ▒Ήηξ ΈςρΈσαΊΖΑΉζΕ ΉαΙΆ│ιΊΨΙΉε╝Έσ░, 1Έ╢ΕΆ╕░ EPS Ά░ΑΉζ┤ΈΞαΉΛνΈΛΦ 1.67~1.73ΈΜυΈθυ(+11~15%)

One Ecolab Ά╡υΉκ░Ήκ░ΉιΧ Ήζ┤ΈΜΙΉΖΦΊΜ░Έ╕Ν ΊβΧΈΝΑ: 2027ΈΖΕ ΈπΡΆ╣ΝΉπΑ Ή┤ζ Ά╡υΉκ░Ήκ░ΉιΧ Έ╣ΕΉγσ 3ΉΨ╡ 3,400ΈπΝ ΈΜυΈθυ(ΉΕ╕ΊδΕ 2ΉΨ╡ 6,100ΈπΝ ΈΜυΈθυ)ΉβΑ ΊΛ╣Έ│ΕΈ╣ΕΉγσ 9,100ΈπΝ ΈΜυΈθυ(ΉΕ╕ΊδΕ 7,100ΈπΝ ΈΜυΈθυ) ΉαΙΉΔΒ

Organic sales +3%, led by accelerating growth in Food & Beverage, Pest Elimination and Life Sciences, and continued strong growth in Specialty and Global High-Tech. This accelerating performance more than offset a combined 2%  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.2 billion = 42ΉΨ╡ ΈΜυΈθυ; $1.98 = 1.98ΈΜυΈθυ; $2.08 = 2.08ΈΜυΈθυ; $8.43 = 8.43ΈΜυΈθυ; $8.63 = 8.63ΈΜυΈθυ; $4.2 = 4.2ΈΜυΈθυ.

PAUL, Minn., February 10, 2026 έΑΜ CEO Comment Christophe Beck, EcolabέΑβs chairman and chief executive officer, said, έΑε2025 was a record year for Ecolab with record sales, operating income margin, EPS, and free cash flows. fourth quarter. This strong performance was fueled by accelerating organic sales growth across most businesses and significant operating income margin expansion. IέΑβm incredibly proud of our team and all they achieved this year. They delivered unmatched customer value and brought breakthrough innovation to market while advancing our One Ecolab growth strategy. Underlying organic sales grew mid-single digits, excluding a combined 2% headwind from basic industries, Paper and an unexpected short-term impact from distributor inventory reductions in Institutional. We expect the distributor inventory impact to largely normalize in the first quarter of 2026, with pressures in basic industries and Paper progressively easing over the next few quarters. Combined with strong new business wins and continued momentum across our growth engines, we expect volume growth to get back to 1% as we exit the

Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition . έΑΜ On February 10, 2026, Ecolab Inc. (έΑεEcolabέΑζ) announced earnings for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025. A copy of the (i) News Release issued by Ecolab in connection with this report under Item 2.02 is furnished and attached as Exhibit (99.1) and (ii) Supplemental Data to be used in connection with the conference call to be held discussing the first quarter results is furnished and attached as Exhibit (99.2), each of which is incorporated by reference herein. Ecolab also will publish the attached exhibits on its website located at www.ecolab.com. έΑΜ Item 2.05 Costs Associated with Exit or Disposal Activities . έΑΜ On July 30, 2024, the Company announced the One Ecolab initiative, which will enhance its growth and margin expansion journey. As a program within this initiative, the Company also announced that it commenced a

plan to leverage its digital technologies to realign the functional work done in many countries into global centers of excellence. On February 10, 2026, the Company announced the expansion of the One Ecolab initiative and anticipates total restructuring costs of $334 million ($261 million after tax) and special charges of $91 million ($71 million after tax) by the end of 2027. The Company anticipates that the restructuring costs will primarily be cash expenditures for severance costs relating to team realignment. έΑΜ Cautionary Statements Regarding Forward Looking Information . έΑΜ Statements contained in this Current Report on Form 8-K, including statements concerning EcolabέΑβs restructuring plan, may constitute έΑεforward-looking statementsέΑζ within the meaning of the Private Securities Litigation Reform  Normalized numeric aliases: $334 million = 3ΉΨ╡ 3,400ΈπΝ ΈΜυΈθυ; $261 million = 2ΉΨ╡ 6,100ΈπΝ ΈΜυΈθυ; $91 million = 9,100ΈπΝ ΈΜυΈθυ; $71 million = 7,100ΈπΝ ΈΜυΈθυ; $334 = 334ΈΜυΈθυ; $261 = 261ΈΜυΈθυ; $91 = 91ΈΜυΈθυ; $71 = 71ΈΜυΈθυ.
